title: Shopping for Clothes
description: Go shopping with Marek, ask about clothes and sizes, pay, keep the receipt, and exchange damaged sneakers.
context: Marek goes with you to buy clothes. You choose a T-shirt and sneakers, ask about price, pay by card, keep the receipt, then come back to exchange damaged sneakers.

exchanges.speaker: seller
exchanges.translation: Good day. Can I help you?

choices.translation: This size does not fit me.

exchanges.correctFeedback: Len sa pozerám. is a natural first answer in a shop.
exchanges.wrongFeedback: Use Len sa pozerám when you are only browsing.

exchanges.speaker: marek

choices.translation: I do not have the receipt.

exchanges.correctFeedback: Chcem toto. is clear when you want the item.
exchanges.wrongFeedback: Use Chcem toto when you want this item.

exchanges.speaker: seller
exchanges.correctFeedback: Veľkosť M. answers the size question.
exchanges.wrongFeedback: Aká veľkosť? asks for size, so answer Veľkosť M.

exchanges.speaker: marek

choices.translation: I do not have the receipt.

exchanges.correctFeedback: Sedí mi to. is the right fit answer.
exchanges.wrongFeedback: If it fits, say Sedí mi to.

exchanges.speaker: seller
exchanges.text: Chcete ešte niečo? Máme aj tenisky a tašky.
exchanges.translation: Do you want anything else? We also have sneakers and bags.

exchanges.speaker: marek
exchanges.text: Máš tričko aj tenisky. Čo sa opýtaš na cenu?
exchanges.translation: You have a T-shirt and sneakers. What will you ask about the price?
exchanges.correctFeedback: Koľko to stojí? asks about the price.
exchanges.wrongFeedback: Use Koľko to stojí? to ask the price.

exchanges.speaker: seller
exchanges.text: Spolu je to tridsať eur. Potrebujete tašku?
exchanges.translation: Together it is thirty euros. Do you need a bag?
exchanges.prompt: You need a bag for the clothes.
exchanges.correctFeedback: Potrebujem tašku. is the right bag phrase.
exchanges.wrongFeedback: Use Potrebujem tašku when you need a bag.

exchanges.speaker: seller

choices.translation: I am paying with a T-shirt.
I am paying with a size.
I am paying with a bag.

exchanges.correctFeedback: Platím kartou. answers how you pay.
exchanges.wrongFeedback: Use Platím kartou for paying by card.

exchanges.speaker: seller
exchanges.translation: Here is the bag. Do you want the receipt?
exchanges.correctFeedback: Prosím účtenku. is the receipt phrase.
exchanges.wrongFeedback: Ask for the receipt with Prosím účtenku.

exchanges.speaker: marek
exchanges.text: Doma vidíš, že tenisky sú poškodené. Čo povieš v obchode?
exchanges.translation: At home you see that the sneakers are damaged. What will you say in the shop?
exchanges.correctFeedback: Je to poškodené. explains the problem clearly.
exchanges.wrongFeedback: For a damaged item, say Je to poškodené.

exchanges.speaker: seller
exchanges.correctFeedback: Mám účtenku. is the correct receipt answer.
exchanges.wrongFeedback: If you have the receipt, say Mám účtenku.

exchanges.speaker: seller
exchanges.translation: Do you want to return it or exchange it?
exchanges.prompt: The sneakers are damaged. Ask to exchange them.
exchanges.correctFeedback: Chcem to vymeniť. is natural when you want a replacement.
exchanges.wrongFeedback: For an exchange, say Chcem to vymeniť.

completionMessage: Great! You can shop for clothes, ask about size and price, pay, keep the receipt, and exchange a damaged item in Slovak.
